guide.title: Usage Guide
guide.tip1: Create a research topic to conduct user interviews using AI
guide.tip2: Click on a card to view interview subjects, content, and full reports

guide.title: Usage Guide
guide.tip1: Add more interview subjects to gain more comprehensive insights
guide.tip2: Select individual interviews one by one, or use "Start All Interviews" to begin in batch
guide.tip3: Generate reports at any time during interviews, or generate a final report after all interviews are completed

SignUp.title: Sign Up
SignUp.subtitle: Create your account
SignUp.invitationCodeHelp: Non-tezign.com email addresses require an invitation code

Verify.title: Verify Your Email
Verify.description: We've sent a verification code to {email}. Please enter it below.
Verify.successMessage: Email verified successfully! You can now sign in.
Verify.codeResent: Verification code resent. Please check your email.

emailContent.expirationNote: This code will expire in 30 minutes.
emailContent.ignoreMessage: If you didn't request this code, please ignore this email.
emailContent.useCodeInstructions: Please use the following code to verify your email address:
emailContent.automatedEmailDisclaimer: This is an automated email from atypica.AI. Please do not reply to this email.

ForgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
ForgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
ForgotPassword.successMessage: If your email is registered with us, you will receive password reset instructions shortly.
ForgotPassword.userNotFound: No account found with this email address
ForgotPassword.resetEmailSent: Password reset email sent. Please check your inbox.

emailContent.resetLinkText: Click here to reset your password
emailContent.expirationNote: This link will expire in 30 minutes.
emailContent.ignoreMessage: If you didn't request this password reset, please ignore this email.
emailContent.resetInstructions: We received a request to reset your password. Click the button below to create a new password:
emailContent.automatedEmailDisclaimer: This is an automated email from atypica.AI. Please do not reply to this email.

ResetPassword.title: Reset Password
ResetPassword.description: Please enter a new password for your account.
ResetPassword.successMessage: Password reset successful! You can now sign in with your new password.

StatusDisplay.background: atypica is running in the background
StatusDisplay.error: An error occurred, please refresh the page and try again
StatusDisplay.confirmAbortDescription: This will stop the current background task. The results may be incomplete.
StatusDisplay.continueInstructions: To continue later, type "continue" in the chat box.
StatusDisplay.evictionWarningMessage: The background task may have stalled. Consider canceling and restarting by typing "continue".
